name: Swingback VGolf
about: SwingBack VGolf offers self-service golf simulator access through a membership model. Members can book private bays for individual practice, virtual rounds with friends, or skill development using guided practice modes. The venue features advanced swing tracking technology with instant feedback and analytics. Memberships are month-to-month with flexible booking options, and the facility is designed for golfers of all skill levels seeking convenient, on-demand simulator access without long-term commitments.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced swing tracking with instant performance analytics
Flexible self-service booking with private bay access
Multiple membership tiers with customizable hour packages
World-class virtual course play with realistic environments
Multiplayer functionality for virtual competitions with friends

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned; BYOB likely allowed
No alcohol service mentioned; BYOB likely allowed

simulator_hardware.notes: Advanced sensors capture club speed, ball trajectory, spin, and shot angle

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: Not specified, but members would need their own clubs to use the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Not explicitly stated, but no food or beverage service is mentioned, suggesting BYOB is permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Not specified, but typical simulator play ranges from 1.5-2.5 hours depending on pace of play.

faq.question: Is this venue suitable for children?
faq.answer: Yes, the simulators are suitable for all skill levels including beginners, with guided practice modes available.
